faqs.question: How is the infrastructure at Rajeev Gandhi Management Institute?
faqs.answer: Institute has good facilities all around the campus such as Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Rajeev Gandhi Management Institute?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Rajeev Gandhi Management Institute is up to 180. Good thing to know is that Rajeev Gandhi Management Institute has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

faqs.question: How can I get into Rajeev Gandhi Management Institute for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Rajeev Gandhi Management Institute has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICTE approved Indian University or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or Institute recognised by the concerned University as equivalent thereto. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 45%. The Bachelor's degree must be of minimum three years duration after passing Higher Secondary (10+2) examination of (10+2) system or equivalent. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Candidate who has passed qualifying examination with grace marks are also eligible for admission. Candidates whose qualifying examination marksheet are based on grading system has to produce conversion of grade to marks.

faqs.question: Which courses does Rajeev Gandhi Management Institute offer to students?
faqs.answer: Rajeev Gandhi Management Institute has courses such as MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of Business & Management Studies.

highlights.summary:
The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for Jeppiaar University admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is a good and nice college.

review_content.Placements: Students with 89% of marks got placed in my course. A minimum salary of Rs. 10,000 and a maximum salary of Rs. 2,00,000 is offered in my course. L&T Company and Infosys offer placements at my college. 50% of students got internships from my course in Infosys. Students get placed in jobs in IT and trading companies. Our college is a good college.
review_content.Infrastructure: My classroom has fast Wi-Fi and neat halls with AC. The hostel has rooms with attached bathrooms and also has common bathrooms. Every night our hostel has a doctor meeting with medicine, a mess with 100 fans, and lights. Sports are played without fees.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My college supports many things to help students improve.

review_content.Placements: 89 percent of students get placed in my course. The minimum package offered is Rs. 10,000, and the maximum is 2 LPA. L&T and Infosys offer placements to my college. 50 percent of students get internships from my course at Infosys, IT companies, and trading companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: My classrooms have fast Wi-Fi and neat halls with AC. The hostel has rooms with attached bathrooms as well as common bathrooms. Every night, our hostel has a doctor available with medicines. The mess has 100 fans. Sports are conducted regularly. Overall, it feels like a great college.

admission_overview.college_name: Jeppiaar University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Jeppiaar University admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Jeppiaar University, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Humanities and Social Sciences and Science.

Some of the popular Jeppiaar University programmes are B.Sc. and B.A., etc at UG level and MBA/PGDM at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Jeppiaar University admissions:

courses_data.name: Jeppiaar University B.Sc. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: B.Sc. at Jeppiaar University is a 3 years UG course in the field of Mass Communication & Media and Design. Jeppiaar University accepts students based on CBSE 12th. The final selection for admission to the Jeppiaar University B.Sc. course is based on the student's performance in the mentioned exams. See below the eligibility for Jeppiaar University B.Sc.:

courses_data.name: Jeppiaar University B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: TheB.E. / B.TechatJeppiaar Universityis a 4 years programme offered to the students in the field of Engineering. Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in TNEA and CBSE 12th. Students can choose from 3 specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering and Biotechnology Engineering among others. To complete the Jeppiaar University admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 6,40,000.

courses_data.name: Jeppiaar University B.Com Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jeppiaar University B.Comis offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.Com programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 3 years programme.

courses_data.name: Jeppiaar University BBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Candidates interested in the fields related to Business & Management Studies can enroll in theJeppiaar University BBAprogramme, which lasts for 3 years. Candidates are not required to appear for any entrance exams as the admission process is merit-based. The final shortlist for admission to the BBA programme is determined by the candidates' academic scores.

Every night, our hostel has a doctor's meeting with medicines. There is a mess with 100 fans. Sports are provided without fee. Indoor games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jeppiaar University.
reviews.review_text: My classrooms have fast Wi-Fi and neat halls with AC. The hostel has rooms with attached bathrooms and also has common bathrooms. Every night, our hostel has a doctor meeting with free medicines. There is a mess with 100 fans. Sports are provided without fee.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers but placements are average only.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities are available in this college. Wi-Fi facility is available in labs, not for students but in lab systems, there is Wi-Fi connection. The hostel facilities are average. The food is good but not as home food. There is importance for sports in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jeppiaar University.
reviews.review_text: My classrooms have fast Wi-Fi and neat halls with AC. The hostel has rooms with attached bathrooms and also has common bathrooms. Every night, our hostel has a doctor meeting with free medicines. There is a mess with 100 fans. Sports are provided without fee.

reviews.review_heading: I write my feedback about my college.
reviews.review_text: My classroom has fast Wi-Fi and neat halls with AC. The hostel has rooms with attached bathrooms and also has common bathrooms. Every night our hostel has a doctor meeting with medicine. There is a mess with 100 fans. Sports are studied without fees, and there is also mobile gaming.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied because management asked for fee payment at starting of college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well-maintained daily, and the Wi-Fi is good for working on the systems. We have three labs in our college, each containing 50 systems, and there is one library. 2. Hostel facilities are good, with weekly cleanings of every room; the mess and canteen are available, and the mess is clean and disciplined. A doctor is available daily from 6 PM to 8 PM, and sports are a top priority for our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities include an AI lab, AI classroom, and library. However, our hostel is the least favorable accommodation at the college, and the mess food is barely edible. A nurse is available in the hostel for medical assistance. Sports and games, such as basketball, are provided in the hostel.

faqs.answer: A:    The Center for Management Studies, Jain University, Bangalore, Karnataka, has 19 courses with an average fee of INR 4,95000 per year. The Center for Management Studies (CMS) was established in 2009 as part of Jain Deemed University. The university offers undergraduate and graduate courses to impart knowledge and skills of business and communication. The university also offers Entrepreneurship Program to encourage the resolving skills of students. The university is accredited with ‘A’ grade by NAAC.10.75 Lacs for two years is the fees to pursue MBA course at centre for management studies Jain Deemed to be university which is called CMS Bangalore. faqs.question: What is the admission process of Center for Management Studies (Jain Deemed to be University)?

answer.text: Admissions for UG and PG courses at Jain University 2023 began on November 16, 2022. Interested students must first apply online for admission to Jain University Bangalore 2023 and take the Jain Entrance Test (JET) for multiple undergraduate and graduate programs. On April 10 and 11, the university held an entrance test for its UG program. All PG programs except MBA and MCom had their phase 2 exam on March 10. Results of the JET personal interview for phase 2 were announced on March 13 after the interview was conducted on March 11. On March 10, candidates will receive an email with the phase 2 interview timings. Jain University conducted the JET 2023 entrance test phase 1 for all PG programs, except MBA and MCom on January 23. JET personal interview for phase 1 was held on January 24 and results were announced on January 25.

review_summary.college_name: CMS Jain University Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Corporate BBA - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good in the end.

content.Placements: 99.8% are placed by choosing this course. The highest package is 22 LPA, and the top company is Deloitte. 99% of the students got internships from this course and from very big companies. The college is very perfect, and the crowd and networking are very excellent.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms and library are very clean. Wi-Fi is working very nicely. The facilities, like medical and sports, are very nice. I'm very happy to join this college.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and well-qualified. The curriculum is very relevant so that the students can score well and get better placements. The college semester exams are not as tough as I thought, they are nice and good for scoring well. The staff are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Corporate BBA - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of Jain University.

content.Placements: 99.8 percent students are placed in our course. This year, the highest package is 22 LPA, and the lowest is 6 LPA. Deloitte recruit. Almost every student got an internship in a top company.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are so good. Wi-Fi works very well, high-speed.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, with PhD qualifications and lots of experience, and very supportive. Our course for the corporate world is very relevant. The semester exams are a little hard, as they should be, because this is what we are learning, it's challenging.

If any student wants to go to the gym in college, they can surely use that facility. Access to Wi-Fi is provided for all students, and they can use it for their academic purposes. individual_reviews.course: Corporate BBA - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the content of education and dissatisfied with placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Business Analyst, operations, marketing, business development, most of the companies where startup and top companies like aditya birla, pcw societe genrale, etc. I don't have the accurate information regarding placement rate but yes most companies come for sales role.
content.Infrastructure: Food was average and there are various options near the college campus and lots of sports opportunities, there is also a canteen in our campus but it's not so wow as many students ho out of campus to have more various options for food So I recommend you to get into college without considering the campus .

individual_reviews.course: Corporate BBA - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good place to gain knowledge as well as enjoy but dissatisfied with the management and planning.

content.Placements: 70% of the students are placed, while the remaining students opt for higher studies or take care of their parents business or own startups. The highest salary for a BBA graduate is 9 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. One of the companies is EY, Deloitte, or Dell. 85% of students got their internships in their 2nd year and the recruiters are Dell, EY, Metvy, and Lernx. The roles offered are sales and marketing manager, business development manager, and warehouse manager.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi, a library, computer labs and parking facilities. The campus is quite small compared to other colleges in Bangalore. The hostel that Jain groups in is affiliated with is MOJO. To be honest, North Indian students will like the food provided in the mess but for South Indian students, we don't like the taste and food. They organise many events in the hostel and every building is located in a good surrounding.

Moreover, candidates appearing in Class 12 can also fill out the application form with result-awaited and can attach the documents once the Class 12 results are released.

faqs.question: Does CMS Bangalore accepts any other entrance exam scores apart from JET scores for admission to its BBA programme?
faqs.answer: No, according to the information available on the official website of the institution and its university, states that for admission to the BBA courses, candidates must complete their Class 12 with a minimum of 50%. Additionally, Jain Entrance Test scores are accepted for admission to the BBA course. However, the university does accept scores of other entrance examinations for different UG & PG courses but for BBA only JET is considered.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Center for Management Studies (Jain Deemed to be University) with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to Center for Management Studies (Jain Deemed to be University) with 60% as there are no minimum marks eligibility criteria for the UG programme in Jain University.However, candidates must pass in all the subjects in Class 12  board exam. The eligibility criteria for admission to the UG programs offered by Center for Management Studies, ( Jain University ) is pass in class XII/ Pre-University/ equivalent exam in any discipline. Selection of candidates is on the basis of their performance in the Jain Entrance Test (JET). The duration of the Jain Entrance Test (JET) is two hours. The test comprises of questions of 100 marks. Students needs to undertake which includes Students counseling, Personal Interview and along with the Written Exams.

faqs.question: What is the entrance exam for Center for Management Studies (Jain Deemed to be University) 2023?
faqs.answer: Candidates must attend the JET entrance examination, with comprised of a written test and a personal interview for the admission. Centre for Management Studies provides admission to full time undergraduate and postgraduate courses, streams such as Arts, Social Sciences, Management and Business Administration. Centre for Management Studies offers admission in BBA, BA, MBA and MA. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria for seeking admissions. CMS Bangalore UG and PG selection process is done based on the marks obtained in the entrance examination conducted by Jain University and it is followed by personal interviews. Candidates who meet the University cutoff will be called for personal interviews.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Center for Management Studies (Jain Deemed to be University)?
faqs.answer: Center for Management Studies (Jain Deemed to be University) offers admission in BBA, BA, MBA and MA. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria for seeking the admissions. Center for Management Studies Bangalore UG and PG selection process is done based on the marks obtained by candidates in the entrance examination conducted by Jain University, Bangalore it is followed by personal interviews. The admission process of Center for Management Studies (Jain Deemed to be University) are:Candidates can visit the Center for Management Studies Bangalore official site and check the eligibility criteria.Candidates those are eligible can register for CMS Bangalore UG or PG courses and create an account.Candidates can log in to the account created, fill out the University application form and upload the required documents for the admission process.Pay the application fee  for UG and PG courses and submit the application form.

faqs.question: Can I join Center for Management Studies (Jain Deemed-to-be-University) without MAT?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is possible to join CMS Business School, Jain (Deemed-to-be University) without MAT scores. While MAT scores are accepted  for admission, it is not mandatory. Center for Management Studies Business School considers a range of entrance exams, including the Jain Entrance Test (JET), CAT, GMAT, CMAT, NMAT, and XAT.It is mandatory for all candidates (except MBA) to take the Jain Entrance Test (JET) in the first stage of selection conducted by Jain University. MBA candidates (JET qualified) must take part in the Group Discussion and Personal Interview sessions conducted by the University. CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, and GMAT scores are also accepted by the university for MBA admission.

placement_data.title: Center for Management Studies Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: CMS Bangalore has released the MBA placement details for the Class of 2025. The highest and average package offered to the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 36.86 LPA and INR 8.66 LPA. More than 600 recruiters visited the campus and placed students across various sectors.

Earlier, the institute recorded 96.70% overall placements in the academic year 2023-24 . The highest and average packages offered was INR 23.5 LPA and INR 5.8 LPA, respectively. The median package offered in 2024 stood at INR 6.65 LPA . The top recruiters of the Center for Management Studies include EY, FedEx, Federal Bank, Godrej, Grant Thornton, JLL, KPMG, Lowe's, Morgan Stanley, McKinsey & Company, Practo, PwC, Tresvista, Wipro, Accenture, etc.

faqs.question: What are the government job opportunities available after completing BBA course from CMS Bangalore?
faqs.answer: After completing the BBA course from Center for Management Studies, candidates can pursue various government job opportunities. reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in the end.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms and library are very clean. Wi-Fi is working very nicely. The facilities, like medical and sports, are very nice. I'm very happy to join this college.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of Jain University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are so good. Wi-Fi works very well, high-speed.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledgeable teachers, good facilities, and no hard and fast rules.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, computer labs, classroom, gym, parking area, workshop for the students are available. If any student wants to go to the gym in college, they can surely use that facility. Access to Wi-Fi is provided for all students, and they can use it for their academic purposes. Class projectors are also available. Classrooms are also well-equipped

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the content of education and dissatisfied with placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text:
Food was average and there are various options near the college campus and lots of sports opportunities, there is also a canteen in our campus but it's not so wow as many students ho out of campus to have more various options for food 
So I recommend you to get into college without considering the campus .

reviews.review_heading: Good place to gain knowledge as well as enjoy but dissatisfied with the management and planning.
reviews.review_text: The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi, a library, computer labs and parking facilities. The campus is quite small compared to other colleges in Bangalore. The hostel that Jain groups in is affiliated with is MOJO. To be honest, North Indian students will like the food provided in the mess but for South Indian students, we don't like the taste and food. They organise many events in the hostel and every building is located in a good surrounding.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are very good, but the campus is very small and bad.
reviews.review_text: Very small building, it's the only drawback. Rest everything is mostly perfect. If our campus was better, it would have been the best college for BBA in Bangalore. I also don't recommend the hostel, it's bad, very bad, not worth it to stay in it, paying 250,000 a month.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed by the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us WiFi and the classrooms are congested but it's okay to sit and study and they provide projectors in every classroom. There is a library, which is called a learning resource center, and we can find all books related to our curriculum there .

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by CMS Business School, Jain Deemed-to-be University, BangaloreReviewed on 21 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty is so great here.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility of CMS Business School is pretty good. It's well managed and organized, which is a good mess facility. Rooms are double-sharing with sufficient space and good interior like cupboard or study table. Other facility are also available like purified water, Wi-Fi enabled, washing machines, 24-hour open mess, etc. Since in hostel there are mix of students who come from different state and cultures. Hostel management gives an open choice for a variety of cuisine.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty but dissatisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The course is very good and so is the faculty. The infrastructure is not good at all for the amount of fee they charge. We only have one building which consists of 6 floors and there is zero sports infrastructure. We don't have a canteen and there is no place to sit or roam around after the college as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by CMS Business School, Jain Deemed-to-be University, BangaloreReviewed on 8 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of MBA in HR from the CMS Business School.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available at this college were very good. The college has an excellent infrastructure for the MBA course. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc. facilities were available for the students. Food in the canteen was good to eat. The hostel facility was also available for the students. Facilities in the hostel were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Life in CMS Jain University.
reviews.review_text: Our university doesn't have a campus. It's a single six-story building. There's no auditorium, and only the seminar halls have air conditioning. Classrooms have fans and projectors. There's one computer lab and a library. There are vending machines for snacks, and a canteen behind the college that serves South Indian food and rolls. Cigarettes are sold within walking distance of the college. The college hostel is too expensive, and the food is unhygienic, as we once found a roach in the rice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by CMS Business School, Jain Deemed-to-be University, BangaloreReviewed on 18 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: MBA in marketing from the CMS Business school.
reviews.review_text: CMS Institute has good quality facilities and infrastructure for the students of the MBA course. All modern facilities were provided by the college management to make students' learning interactive. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, etc., were available for the students. Sports and medical facilities were also available for the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by CMS Business School, Jain Deemed-to-be University, BangaloreReviewed on 22 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: With just some changes, it would be best university in India.
reviews.review_text: Jain University has an awesome environment and modern facilities but language barriers are the main problem. Locals only understand Kannada. Many local students dominate college like rowdy things. The college has Wi-Fi in every section. We have 3 libraries on campus; all are best but capacity-wise, library 1 is the biggest. The college has hostels for girls and boys. The hostel is looking like a 4-star hotel. Mess only provides pure vegetarian food but rent is too, like nearly 2 lacs, and a gym ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by CMS Business School, Jain Deemed-to-be University, BangaloreReviewed on 21 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Jain Deemed-to-be University.
reviews.review_text: Here you would not get a big campus like other university. You would not get outdoor sports ground. Sometimes Wi-Fi is not working, browsing speed is very less and there is no proper network in classrooms. College is good in terms of library they have bunch of books arranged in shelves. You can issue and take it home but you need to return or renew it within 15 days. College hostels are so expensive and it is always from campus that we need to travel by college bus. College food is not good. In ...

college_info.college_name: CMS Jain University Bangalore Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The Center for Management Studies, Jain University, Bangalore, Karnataka, has 19 courses with an average fee of INR 4,95000 per year. The Center for Management Studies (CMS) was established in 2009 as part of Jain Deemed University. The university offers undergraduate and graduate courses to impart knowledge and skills of business and communication. The university also offers Entrepreneurship Program to encourage the resolving skills of students. The university is accredited with ‘A’ grade by NAAC.10.75 Lacs for two years is the fees to pursue MBA course at centre for management studies Jain Deemed to be university which is called CMS Bangalore. For the eligibility graduation would be 50% and exam which has cleared MAT, CAT, XAT, NMAT, CMAT JET etc.

The application fee for BA at Center for Manaement Studies Bangalore is INR 600. The mode of application is online. Candidates can pay the application from after completimg allnthe steps of application process such as registering for the course, creating login credentials, uploading the required documents, etc. Before applying candidates should keep these doucments ready:

CMS Business School offers scholarships to meritorious students under various schemes. The scholarship is offered to those students who fulfill the criteria decided by the JAIN (Deemed-to-be University) Scholarship Committee (JUSC). The scholarship will be a tuition fee waiver on a percentage basis and will not cover living costs.

The total tuition fee for the MA CMS Bangalore is INR 3.3 lakh. This MA CMS Bangalore fee is exclusive of various charges like the admission fee charges, library deposits, and others. The programme & the college fee is quite flexible in nature, hence reach the college complete website for all the updated details.

reviews.review_heading: The college, infrastructure, and all things are good.
reviews.review_text: More infrastructure is available in the department. We have a library, neat classrooms, a sports ground, and games. The quality of the hostel for girls and boys is provided. The infrastructure is good. There is a canteen for each department. The food provided is okay.

reviews.review_heading: My College life experience .
reviews.review_text: The classroom is at a very normal level; it is not even average. It's an old college, and they don't have Wi-Fi facilities. The library is good in the college. The hostel is also average. The hostel food is good. They have no canteen in the college. If there is an emergency, you have to go out.

reviews.review_heading: Skr engineering college review.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available. Lab facilities, 50 seater class rooms, department library and college library are available. Hostel rooms are comfortable and the food is average. Canteen is average. Medical facility and first aid kit are available. Sports and games are often conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SKR Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was great. The library was also provided. There was a huge general library in A block, and several books were available. Free Wi-Fi was also available. The food served in the mess was good at reasonable prices. Each department provided basic first aid items. A huge volleyball court was also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and the teaching of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel consists of good rooms. The hostel surroundings are awesome to study anywhere with peace. Except for food, everything in the college is good. Our college stands top 20 in sports. Our students play the main role in participating in games and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a better college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi facility on the campus, and the students can easily use it. Wi-Fi speed is also good. Classrooms are good with the help of workers. There is a library that contains study-related books, but they are only related to specific authors. Food served to the students is not bad.

reviews.review_heading: A good Institute and to need to improve alot.
reviews.review_text:
1. Good infrastructure. Wi-Fi available for 24/7. Labs are highly equipped. Library is bigger and the widest range books are available. 
2. Hostels are average. Sharing and independents rooms are available. The food is High quality and also good taste. Sports are not priority in our college. But having bigger grounds.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good for financially average students.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. Facilities such as Wi-Fi, library, Physics lab, chemistry lab, circuits lab, auditorium, seminar hall, temples are available in our college. Good quality of food is served in the hostel. A room is to be shared by 2  students in the hostel. The college canteen is available, and the mess serves different types of food.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with placements, but faculty members and campus surroundings are good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms of our college have an average atmosphere. Facilities are old, and some are of the repaired state. The library has the best maintenance, but Wi-Fi is not available easily. Mechanical department facilities in fluid mechanics laboratory were using repaired and very old machines. Metrology and dynamics labs were closer, and a software laboratory is well-maintained. Quality of the hostel is average, and the quality of food is low in mess and canteen. Sports are rarely conducted, but there...

reviews.review_heading: Teaching is good, but they should conduct more events and sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good from outside, but it should be improved more inside. The college provides more time for students to participate in sports. Quality of food served is average, and the quantity is too low.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with good placement records.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped labs with good safety measures. Both the common library and departmental library are available here, and they are well-maintained. One can get unlimited meals at low prices here, and the food offered is healthy. Our hostels are in good condition, and they are properly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: A college where one can gain great knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus environment is good, and the campus is spacious. We also have a big playground to play cricket. There is a well-equipped gym available here for the students to become physically fit. We have well-equipped laboratories. Even our computer lab is good, well-equipped and is Wi-Fi enabled. Our classrooms are spacious and are equipped with a projector and other smart class aids.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in providing education, and one can get a successful life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are lots of trees in the surroundings, and every place in the college is clean and neat. Good modifications are done in the college, and the lab infrastructure is very good. The condition of the equipment is also good. Overall, the infrastructure of the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good and simple except the hostel.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and they provide free Wi-Fi for every student with 1gb limit daily. The labs are good, and the renovated classrooms are Perfect. Every classroom has CCTV camera. The environment is cool as the campus is full of trees. The college has two cricket grounds, and for all the sports. The gym facility is also provided in the college. The college library is big and good. The hostel rooms are not bad.

reviews.review_heading: My four (4) years of life has been great enough.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with basic facilities for everything. The lab facilities with good atmosphere and classrooms are available. A normal canteen is available on the campus. Classrooms are maintained clean with good atmosphere for students. Projectors also provided for E-class in the classroom.

reviews_list.review_title: The best college in terms of placements and knowledge.

review_summary.college_name: Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The review of Vivekanand Institute of Technology and Science.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are not that good. Only a few companies visited the campus for placements. Companies like Genpact and some robotics companies visited the campus at the end of the placement season. Roles like software engineer and some internships are offered. Around 30% of the students get placed from our college. The placement cell is operational, and they were not able to provide efficient placement opportunities. They are even not able to bring a good number of companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Both the girls' and boys' hostels were available on the campus. Classrooms were okay, but they weren't air-conditioned. Quality of the food offered was good. Hostel rooms were good, and the college also provides the gym facility. The rooms are allocated on the double occupancy basis. I didn't face any issues related to the infrastructure of our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: This was a good institute during my tenure, 2013.

content.Placements: Some of our seniors and some from my batch got hired by private companies. Dean said the best private companies would take a bribe to visit the campus for placements, and that is the reason we all got placed by our own and not from college in the companies like Infosys, Sony, Jaypee Cements, Jindal Pipes, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The whole campus and hostel were fully enabled with Wi-Fi facility. Medical facilities were good inside and outside the college because there was a hospital beside my college. Every day, there are games for hostel boys, for example, volleyball, cricket, and indoor games like carrom, chess, table tennis, and badminton.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The best college in terms of placements and knowledge.

content.Placements: The placement of the college has very good placement records as compared to another college in the area. The college is just opposite to Jindal steels, so they are the frequent visitors for the placement and the summer internship in the college. For other branches like CSE and ECE, the most visitors are HCL, TCS, Wipro. In the last year, the maximum package of placement was gone to 15 lakhs per annum, and the minimum was 4.5 lakhs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good infrastructure, and its surrounding is full of greenery and beautiful trees. The canteen of the college is the best for the food even you are away from home. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and the classrooms are fully equipped with the digital projectors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: College life as expected by each and every student. I had a lot of memories in the college

content.Placements: Speaking about placements in the college, a number of companies visited the college to offer jobs. The maximum number of students were placed in the first round of the campus drive. Companies like Genpact, Logictech, etc offered jobs. I was selected for Logictech and was offered the profile of R&D intern.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was up to the mark. We had a huge playground in all the surrounding colleges. The hostels were very spacious and the classrooms were also very spacious and well-ventilated. The cafeteria was the most loved place in the college. We had a huge library where students got a wide range of books to enrich their knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The best place to get knowledge from

content.Placements: The placements are average. Mostly, the placements are for the computer science branch. As the college is located near Noida, many companies used to visit from there. Recently, a job fair was conducted by the college and many students were placed in Cyrus group with a good package. The companies that visit mostly are Justdial, Cyrus group, Paytm, and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure and it is famous for its surrounding among the colleges near it. The full campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The facility is only for the students, faculty members, and the management staff. The library is the place of worship in the college it is really very beautiful and the environment created there for studies is awesome.

I just want to say that the infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: A very good institute until 2015, known for its prestige and fame but its name degraded slowly.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was average. The buildings were nice good classrooms with hi-tech labs, but the Wi-Fi speed was slow as compared to the other colleges of that route. There was a single canteen in the campus, but it was not full of as regular stuff, and the management of the canteen was not good. The hostel has a friendly environment, the warden is supportive and helps the students whenever indeed.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but placement not good.
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure is good. The college is fully Wi-Fi enabled with separate routers for buildings, office,
hostels. Labs, library, medical facilities, sports, gym, etc. are available.

The library is only available during the college working hours (9:30 am- 5:00 pm). In labs, almost all the required instruments are available, but among those, some are not working properly.
Labs and classrooms are not AC enabled, only the library and computer labs have AC.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not that good.
reviews.review_text: There is not a single college in Delhi NCR in which the infrastructure is bad. We had a library, cafeteria, etc. The playground was not that good, but it was just average. There was a boys and girls hostel, but the condition of the hostel might be good. I don't know because I didn't spend time in the hostel.

review_content.General: The infrastructure and facilities are average. There is one computer lab provided for our department. Wi-Fi is available in the lab but not in the classrooms. The lab can be bigger. Classrooms use chalk and a board instead of smart classrooms. No digital boards are available. Projectors are available. Hostel facilities are good, and the quality of food is also good. Medical facilities are not so good. There is turf, which is football. There is ground, other sports equipment, and accessories also. But there are restrictions on playing for our department. There is a good library available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: In my opinion, this college is better for studies and college events, not for sports persons.

review_content.Placements: In our college, placement is there, but MNCs are not taking students because of their knowledge and skills. But you can still get placed through our college. The management is now trying to improve students’ skills. I think after 2 or 3 years, placements will be better in Nirmala College of Engineering. In Nirmala College, all their colleges get placed equally
review_content.Infrastructure: Better infrastructure compared to other colleges, and their labs are all good. They also have a turf for students. In Nirmala College, there are four colleges in the same campus, for example, Nirmala College of Engineering, Nirmala College of Arts and Science, Nirmala Polytechnic College, and Health and Science (Pharmacy). Nirmala College of Engineering has separate labs and facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am very much satisfied because of the educational facilities and good placements.

review_content.Placements: Getting placements is a bit tough. But the online facilities for campus admissions are very good and efficient. Top recruiting companies for mechantronics are Wipro, Deloitte, Accenture, TCS, etc. Almost 80% of students get internships in mechantronics from companies like Wipro, Accenture, TCS, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-set with modern and advanced technologies for better education. All students get high-speed Wi-Fi for educational purposes. Also, the labs are well maintained with all essential equipment. The library has almost all the books needed for our course. The food available at campus canteen could be a little better. The college has much scope for many sports.

review_summary.college_name: Nirmala College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Education purpose and only for events you can come to Nirmala College not for sports.

content.Placements: In Nirmala College the placements are average and only placements are coming for CSE and mechatronics. Placement are very poor. All packages are dependent on students on the campus of Nirmala College. All students are average and upcoming students like 1 year batch all will be well placed because they have 10 and 9 CGPA.
content.Infrastructure: In Nirmala College they have above average facilities. Wi-Fi 5 GB is available in lab and we can connect to that Wi-Fi in classroom. Library is also available on average for me. Hostel facility is very bad in Nirmala College. You can use PG facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the management team of the college.

content.Placements: I am a semester 7 student at Nirmala College pursuing B.Teach in Computer Science and Engineering. From my current semester, very few students are placed. No one from the Computer Science department has been placed. Top recruiters are Innovative and Infosys. No one got any internships from any companies. The highest packages offered were 36 LPA
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are average. There is one computer lab provided for our department. Wi-Fi is available in the lab but not in the classrooms. The lab can be bigger. Classrooms use chalk and a board instead of smart classrooms. No digital boards are available. Projectors are available. Hostel facilities are good, and the quality of food is also good. Medical facilities are not so good. There is turf, which is football. There is ground, other sports equipment, and accessories also. But there are restrictions on playing for our department. There is a good library available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In my opinion, this college is better for studies and college events, not for sports persons.

content.Placements: In our college, placement is there, but MNCs are not taking students because of their knowledge and skills. But you can still get placed through our college. The management is now trying to improve students’ skills. I think after 2 or 3 years, placements will be better in Nirmala College of Engineering. In Nirmala College, all their colleges get placed equally
content.Infrastructure: Better infrastructure compared to other colleges, and their labs are all good. They also have a turf for students. In Nirmala College, there are four colleges in the same campus, for example, Nirmala College of Engineering, Nirmala College of Arts and Science, Nirmala Polytechnic College, and Health and Science (Pharmacy). Nirmala College of Engineering has separate labs and facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very much satisfied because of the educational facilities and good placements.

content.Placements: Getting placements is a bit tough. But the online facilities for campus admissions are very good and efficient. Top recruiting companies for mechantronics are Wipro, Deloitte, Accenture, TCS, etc. Almost 80% of students get internships in mechantronics from companies like Wipro, Accenture, TCS, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-set with modern and advanced technologies for better education. All students get high-speed Wi-Fi for educational purposes. Also, the labs are well maintained with all essential equipment. The library has almost all the books needed for our course. The food available at campus canteen could be a little better. The college has much scope for many sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Disappointed by the management.

content.Placements: About 3%-4% of students have been placed in different companies. The companies the lowest package is Rs. 10,000 and the highest package is Rs. 30,000. Top recruiting companies for our course are Cognizant, Sutherland, etc. All students got internships from various companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are limited, there is no table Wi-Fi connection, and no-AC classrooms. Labs and libraries are available. I'm not living in hostel, I'm a daily traveler. I heard that the food is much worse in our hostel, better taking outside hostels, then only we get the freedom.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best college in South Gujarat for MBA.

review_content.Placements: Naranlala college has the highest placements in the campus recruitment. In the batch of 2017-2019, 98% of students got recruit in different companies. The highest package per annum is 6.75 lacs and the average package is 2.50 lacs per annum. In the marketing department students has 100% placement in this batch. This college has also a preplacement program for the student. Students got good stipend during the internship. Maximum students got selected for internship in good companies. This college is excellent in the placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Naranlala MBA college has Wi-Fi facility for the student. College has labs with maximum accommodation of 70-80 students. Each classroom has a projector system and A. C. and there is a Hall for the seminar. College has good quality food available in the canteen. College has a big area for the parking facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The best faculty members are available for management and commerce studies.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are not guaranteed. The college doesn't offer campus placements. Our city is very small and so the placements are low. Some banking companies conduct placement drives for MBA students. Almost 60% of the students from the MBA department got placed through campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two huge grounds on both the sides of the main gate of our college. One is for playing cricket, football, volleyball, etc., and another one is for parking vehicles or to conduct any cultural activities and parties. There are four different buildings. One is for commerce and science department. The second one is for B.Ed studies. The third one is for management. The fourth one is for primary school and a small canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Naranlala College of Commerce and Management.
reviews.review_text: The facility available for us was just the library. There is not any computer work, so the computer lab was not useful to us. Classrooms are huge in size, and students are comfortable in them. There is no hostel in our college. I rate the canteen below average as there is no sitting facility.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are good and nice classrooms. It has a very good structure for labs. Wi-Fi facility is available. The infrastructure of our college is good. The canteen available for the students is good.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college in South Gujarat for MBA.
reviews.review_text: Naranlala MBA college has Wi-Fi facility for the student. College has labs with maximum accommodation of 70-80 students. Each classroom has a projector system and A. C. and there is a  Hall for the seminar. College has good quality food available in the canteen. College has a big area for the parking facility.

reviews.review_heading: The best faculty members are available for management and commerce studies.
reviews.review_text: There are two huge grounds on both the sides of the main gate of our college. One is for playing cricket, football, volleyball, etc., and another one is for parking vehicles or to conduct any cultural activities and parties. There are four different buildings. One is for commerce and science department. The second one is for B.Ed studies. The third one is for management. The fourth one is for primary school and a small canteen.

reviews.review_heading: This college had very best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms has their Wi-Fi, very good connections Classroom was very clean in condition. All facilities were provided were in high quality. This campus is very good and careful for all the lab practices and curricular activities, like cricket, Foot ball.

reviews.review_heading: It is really good. I am totally satisfied with the facilities, and course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for the commerce department are Wi-Fi, classrooms with a seating capacity of 45 to 60 students and a library with more than 1000 books. The hotel facilities are amazing. Daily room and washrooms cleaning service and the quality of the food served here are good, besides there is an option on the campus food court and canteen, which is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are qualified, and the college has good placement opportunities.

content.Placements: In placements, based on the student, a minimum CGPA of 6 in the university exams is required. The minimum package starts from 3 to 5 LPA. The highest package in our college is 1 CPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good. There are many buildings on the campus. Each building looks nice. The main college infrastructure is excellent. The hostel mess looks like a hotel, but the food quality is average and tastes okay.
content.Faculty: The passing CGPA in college is 4. Faculty is knowledgeable and qualified. If a student fails the semester exam and has at least 4 backlogs, they must appear for the semester backlog exam. Rai sir is a very strict teacher.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 90% of students are placed. The highest package offered is 40 LPA, the average package offered is 6 LPA to 7 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Microsoft, and L&T. A few internships are ISRO, DRDO, and BHEL. Roles as embedded, VLSI, network, software, QA/test engineer are top roles offered in network engineering.
content.Infrastructure: ECE department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a rich library with e-journals. Hostels are decent with Wi-Fi, furnished rooms, and average mess food. Canteens offer variety. Medical aid with an ambulance is available. Sports, gym, and indoor/outdoor games are well supported.

admission_overview.college_name: LNCT Excellence College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: LNCT Excellence College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.LNCT Excellence Collegeadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, GATE, and CMAT. Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,20,000 - 2,64,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, a library, an auditorium, etc., facilities are provided. I would say it is worth spending the money we pay for fees because every facility is quite decent with proper management. A new auditorium named Aryabhatta Auditorium was recently made which has top-notch infrastructure and facilities. Every classroom is equipped with a projector. The campus is beautiful and lush green.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, decent placements, and provides good opportunities for hackathon.
reviews.review_text: Excellent facilities are there including Wi-Fi, classrooms, and library. Food is delicious. It provides variety of food. Canteen campus is very nice. Our campus has greenery and environment is friendly. Office culture has good quality of food. Bus facilities are best.

reviews.review_heading: We get good opportunities (hackathon) for off-campus recruitment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure condition is excellent for all other branches. There are 2 hostels for girls and 2 boys hostels. 1st year boys are allowed to stay in hostel while upto 4th year girls are provided hostel. There are separate messes on two floors for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Most value-for-money college with great facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good. You get Wi-Fi all around the campus, but your mobile data will barely work. The library is below average. The labs and classes are good. Hostels are very good, but food quality is variable. We also have a dispensary, and game equipment can be issued by the hostel warden.

reviews.review_heading: The Review of LNCT Excellence Bhopal
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the library is very well-equipped with books, though some may be outdated. The labs are well-equipped with all necessary instruments. However, there is an issue with the hostel food, which is not of good quality, and sometimes insects are found in it. The classrooms are good, but there is no Wi-Fi connection. The food quality in the canteen is very good but costly. Medical facilities are available and are good. Sports facilities are also provided; you can access s...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and food.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good in college. Also, canteen food is the best and I don't know about hostel food but hostel buildings are excellent. Hostels are very good and now a new building is on the way. Hostel fees start at INR 80,000 for base hostels and go up for new hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Lastly, I want to say that our college is the best college in Madhya Pradesh .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good for students, like Wi-Fi, many labs with proper cleaning and well-maintained rooms, clean and maintained classrooms, and a good library in LNCTE. The hostel facility is poor due to their food and maintenance; the Wi-Fi is not working properly; the canteen is good but the price is very high compared to other local shops; the medical facility is very good; and the sports facilities are also very good for their playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college faculty and staff.
reviews.review_text: Very good faculty and staff because the faculty only teaches to students, but all the staff make the college neat and clean and the hostels are also good; their discipline is good; the quality of food is quite good; the taste of mom's hand food is heaven; and the food and other facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college. Fully satisfied. But it established in 2015 so it has this drawback.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, and the environment is clean, green, and fresh. Wi-Fi sometimes causes problems; otherwise, it is good. Labs are well-organized and structured. The classroom is neat, clean, and has a capacity for 70 students. The library provides all the necessary books and journals. Compared to nearby markets, the hostel feels quite promising and affordable. The mess and canteen are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Creating future with good services and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is great the classrooms are well-equipped with the latest teach and labs are also equipped with the latest devices and machines with 24/7 internet connection. The hostel here are great 24/7 Wi-Fi security is also good too but the food here average.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: Our college management and infrastructure are not good but it has good teachers.

review_content.Placements: Placements were also not available. The companies will provide an average salary package for freshers. I would recommend students to join this college to learn better.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good. The food served in the canteen was average. But sometimes the food quality was not good. Sports were not encouraged in this college. They only concentrate on sports like cricket, volleyball, and kabbadi.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful to clear our doubts. But few faculty members were available in this college. Semester exams were conducted very strictly. The pass percentage was 60%. If we score below 60 it will be considered as arrear. They did not provide notes to students. The petrochemical course was demandable but there were no faculty members to teach us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are knowledgeable here, and the campus infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: From our college, about 80% of the students got placed. IBM is the top recruiting company of our course. About 90% of the students got internships. Among that, about 75% of the students got internships in Wipro company. Communication skills development course is offered by our college to enhance your skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility, canteen, basketball court, cricket ground, medical facilities, hostel, labs, auditorium, indoor games and outdoor sports are available here. Every year our college conducts sports day and more than 3 industrial visits. Every year our college conducts an outstation tour for more than 3 days.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, but facilities are less.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of 2014-2018 batch from the mechanical engineering department. Below 10% of the students were placed from our course. The salary offered is Rs. 10,000-20,000 per month. Tech Mahindra was the only top recruiting company for our course. Maintenance, production and quality were the roles offered to the students of our course. In our course, the salary offered is Rs. 40,000-80,000 per month. About 5% of the students got an internship in Indian Railway.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are less in our college, and the campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms and library are good, and labs are also normal. Hostel facilities are mid-range. Quality food is good, but the taste is not that good. Medical and sports and games facilities are available here.

review_summary.college_name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Petrochemical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good place to earn ethics and knowledge through core papers.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 1 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs 40,000 per month. The average salary offered was Rs 60,000 per month. Top recruiting companies were CPCL, CETEX, and MPL. Almost 70% of students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratory was well-equipped. The food quality was average. Medical facilities were better. Sports were conducted in this college. The food served in the canteen was better. All facilities were excellent.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality was very good. Teachers were excellent. The course curriculum was relevant to make students ready for the industry. Semester exams were difficult. The pass percentage was 50%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Petrochemical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college management and infrastructure are not good but it has good teachers.

content.Placements: Placements were also not available. The companies will provide an average salary package for freshers. I would recommend students to join this college to learn better.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good. The food served in the canteen was average. But sometimes the food quality was not good. Sports were not encouraged in this college. They only concentrate on sports like cricket, volleyball, and kabbadi.
content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful to clear our doubts. But few faculty members were available in this college. Semester exams were conducted very strictly. The pass percentage was 60%. If we score below 60 it will be considered as arrear. They did not provide notes to students. The petrochemical course was demandable but there were no faculty members to teach us.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are knowledgeable here, and the campus infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: From our college, about 80% of the students got placed. IBM is the top recruiting company of our course. About 90% of the students got internships. Among that, about 75% of the students got internships in Wipro company. Communication skills development course is offered by our college to enhance your skills.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility, canteen, basketball court, cricket ground, medical facilities, hostel, labs, auditorium, indoor games and outdoor sports are available here. Every year our college conducts sports day and more than 3 industrial visits. Every year our college conducts an outstation tour for more than 3 days.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college, but facilities are less.

content.Placements: I am a student of 2014-2018 batch from the mechanical engineering department. Below 10% of the students were placed from our course. The salary offered is Rs. 10,000-20,000 per month. Tech Mahindra was the only top recruiting company for our course. Maintenance, production and quality were the roles offered to the students of our course. In our course, the salary offered is Rs. 40,000-80,000 per month. About 5% of the students got an internship in Indian Railway.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are less in our college, and the campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms and library are good, and labs are also normal. Hostel facilities are mid-range. Quality food is good, but the taste is not that good. Medical and sports and games facilities are available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: There are great faculty members, so students become future leaders. We got placed well in 2018.

content.Placements: About 50% of the students from our course got placed. The average salary offered here is Rs. 15,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 5,000 per month. Swagatham is the top recruiting company for mechanical engineers. A mechanical design engineer is a top role offered in our course. Over 75% of the students from our college got internships from the mechanical course and got jobs in Swagatham.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is decent but not high-class compared to big colleges. There is no Wi-Fi facility, but there are labs and classrooms with proper teaching and good facilities. There is a decent library. The hostel is good, where there will be no ragging. In the hostel, there is an attached toilet and separate bathroom for every room with spacious arrangements. Good sports and medical facilities are available.

paragraphs: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering and Business and Management Studies.

Some of the popular Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology programmes are B.E. / B.Tech, etc at UG level and M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions:

courses_data.name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers B.E. / B.Tech for 3 - 4 years at the UG level. This course is offered in full time mode. Candidates are offered admission in B.E. / B.Tech based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers B.E. / B.Tech in specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering and Computer Science Engineering, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 2,00,000. Check below the Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology eligibility criteria for B.E. / B.Tech: Eligibility Criteria

courses_data.name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA/PGDM Admission 2025

The Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA/PGDM fee isINR 35,000depending upon the specialisation. Find below the key highlights for Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA/PGDM:

courses_data.name: Indira Institute of Engineering and Technology M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025

The programme is offered in specialisations such as Construction Engineering, Power Engineering and Computer Science Engineering. highlights.summary: The AP ICET 2026 registration portal will now remain open for the Vignanasudha Institute of Management And Technology admission to the MBA/PGDM course till Mar 17, 2026, without a late fee. The exam for the same is scheduled to take place on May 2, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and good infrastructure along with other cultural activities.

review_content.Placements: 70 percent of students have been placed. The highest package offered is 21 LPA. Infosys, Wipro, and TCS are the companies that have visited. They provide training for the specific companies for 2 months, and also conduct exams for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: They provide excellent infrastructure and good food. To make students active they provide sports on weekends. They even take and go to the temple during festivals. Good security for the ladies hostel is very important. They provide detailed information to parents about outings.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Very good college but exam dates are not informed on time and feels torture.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of passing students is very high like 90% and top recruiting companies are coming to recruit here. Software roles are offered very highly in this college. The lowest package is 4 LPA and the highest is 11 LPA and I have not placed in this college myself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Excellent very good and neat infrastructure. It has very nice labs and the facility is good. Neat food and water are provided. Hostel is good for boys and girls. Courses offered for postgraduate in both MBA and MCA. Classrooms are very neat. Sports activities and cultural activities are good.

Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Cipla, Lupin, and Felix. Around 10% of our students received internships from Felix-related companies. They offer us the best packages for us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are available in our department like Wi-Fi is good, labs are good but could be better. Our classrooms are clean and the library is too good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is excellent. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also very good. They provide the best medical facilities as well as the best sports and games.
