review_summary.college_name: Bhabha University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This college is very good for studies.

content.Placements: The placement here is pretty decent. The average package offered here is 3-5 lacs per annum, and the highest package offered here is 7-10 lacs per annum. Almost 70% of students get placed in well-known companies. The placement coordinator is a very helpful person.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent. Very quiet and nature-friendly surroundings with well-maintained facilities and up-to-date equipment are there. The class room is well equipped with Wi-Fi access for everyone; laboratories have well-updated technologies; and libraries have well-stocked books.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied by faculty and placement.

content.Placements: Most of the get placement. All the students get internships. The course makes students professional doctors. After completing your graduation, you will practice as a dentist or you can also go for academics. You can open your own clinic as well as hospital and do your own consultancy.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library. Quality of food is excellent. All the sports are organised every year. Medical facilities are very good. Quality of food in the canteen as well as in the mess is very good. Hostels are well maintained and all the facilities are available. The campus is too big.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college because faculty members are not good.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. There are no companies recruiting. Almost 100% of students got internships. There are no offers for internship students by this college. Students are very good at this college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs are not available in our college. Classrooms are not good. The facilities in the hostel are not good. Food is not available in the hostel. Mess, canteen, and playgrounds are not available. There will be no games played on the grounds of this college. Water and other needed sources are not provided by the college management and the college does not provide any facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has the best infrastructure and good facilities.

content.Placements: Till now, only 3 people have been selected for campus placement. They placed them in apprentice-based jobs like Sadar, with the highest salary package of 2.5 LPA, the lowest salary package of 1.5 LPA, and an average salary package of 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Cipla, Lupin, and Felix. Around 10% of our students received internships from Felix-related companies. They offer us the best packages for us.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are available in our department like Wi-Fi is good, labs are good but could be better. Our classrooms are clean and the library is too good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is excellent. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also very good. They provide the best medical facilities as well as the best sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Average college. Placements never came in 2015. Overall my decision for admission was right.

content.Placements: Almost 90% students were there as the classes were full. In 2015 the lowest package was 20000 and average was 100000. As the highest was 200000 for mostly biharis students those who haven't got scholarship. There was no company for internship as every students go out for internship. But at the time of admission they have told for internship. But that was fake .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was not so good. As it was like just a box type blocks. Wi-fi was not available at that time labs were available. Workshop were also there. Mess was for hostel. And canteen for discollar. Library was of around 3000 sq ft and had appprox 10000 books at my time for engineering.

admission_overview.college_name: Bhabha University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Fee and Seats

paragraphs: Bhabha University admission 2025is both merit and entrance based. The University offers programmes at certificate, diploma, undergraduate, PG diploma, postgraduate and doctoral levels.Bhabha University BDS admissionis through NEET UG and the University accepts the rank ofNEET PGto offer admission in the MDS programme.Bhabha University BTech admissionis through JEE Main.

Candidates who want to take admission in the MBA programme must appear for CAT/XAT/ GMAT/ ATMA/ MAT/ CMAT.Bhabha University admissionsare also based on GATE andGPATrank and scores for MTech and MPharma programmes. Candidates who wish to take admission in any of theBhabha University coursesmust apply online for admission on theBhabha University website.

Bhabha University application process 2025is expected to begin soon. The University accepts the scores of various entrance examinations such as JEE Main, NEET UG, NEET PG, CMAT, GATE etc. to offer admission in specific courses. Admission to both the UG and PG programmes atBhabha Universityare merit and entrance based. Find below the key highlights forBhabha University admissions:
Particulars
Bhabha University Admission Highlights
Mode of Study
Full Time/ Offline
Programmes Offered
31 (excluding specialisations)
Admission Status 2025
How to Apply?
bhabhauniversity.edu.in (Bhabha University website)
Level of Programmes Offered
Certificate| Diploma| Undergraduate| Postgraduate| PG Diploma| Doctoral
Popular Programmes
BTech| BDS| BPharma| B.Ed| LLB| BCom| MCA| MBA

Bhabha University admissions 2025are both entrance and merit based.Bhabha University admissionsare through NEET UG/ NEET PG/ JEE Main/ CMAT/CAT/ GPAT/ GATE etc. for specific courses. Minimum eligibility is Class 12 for undergraduate programmes and UG degree for PG diploma and postgraduate programmes. Given below is the list ofBhabha University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria

Class 12 withPhysicsand Mathematics along with one subject from Chemistry/Biology/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject or diploma in Engineering and Technology with minimum 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC category candidates from Madhya Pradesh)
Class 12 with Physics and Chemistry along with one subject from Mathematics/ Biology/ Biotechnology with at least 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates from Madhya Pradesh)
Merit based
Merit based
Graduation/ Post graduation in any subject with minimum score of 50% and BE/ Science (Maths) with 55% (for General and OBC) and 45% for SC/ ST category candidates from Madhya Pradesh
Merit Based
Undergraduate degree with minimum 50% marks and 45% marks for SC/ ST/ OBC (excluding Creamy Layer) category candidates from Madhya Pradesh
CMAT/CAT/ XAT/MAT/ GMAT/ATMA
BDS or equivalent qualification
Graduation in Engineering or Technology with minimum 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC category candidates from Madhya Pradesh)
Graduate degree in Pharmacy with minimum 55% marks (50% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC category candidates from Madhya Pradesh)
BCA/ Bachelor’s degree in CSE
BSc/ BCom/ BA with with Mathematics at Class 12 or Graduation level with minimum 50% marks (45% marks for reserved category candidates)
Merit Based
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Bhabha University charges different fees for various programmes it offers at the diploma, undergraduate and postgraduate levels.Bhabha University feesfor the undergraduate programmes ranges between INR 1.76 lakh and INR 10 lakh and the fees structure for the postgraduate programmes offered by the affiliated institutes of Bhabha University ranges from INR 66,000 to INR 1.18 lakh. Given below is the tabular representation ofBhabha University fees:
Total Tuition Fees

Bhabha University seat intakevaries according to the programmes offered by the University at the undergraduate and postgraduate level. The seat intake for the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes varies according institutions affiliated to Bhabha University. Given below is the tabular representation ofBhabha University seat intake:
Seat Intake
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Bhabha University admission process 2025will begin soon. The University accepts the scores of qualifying as well as entrance examinations to offers admission in various programmes in its affiliated institutes.Bhabha University admissionis a multi-stage process. Candidates who wish to take admission in any of the programme in the affiliated institutions must fill the online enquiry form, check eligibility and must upload documents. If eligible, candidates must submit registration fees, fill admission form and finally receive admission slip. Given below isBhabha University admission process:
STEP 1: Bhabha University Application Process 2025

Canddates who wish to take admission in any of the programmes at Bhabha University must first fill out the enquiry form available on Bhabha University website: bhabhauniversity.edu.in, check the eligibility for the particular programme and upload all the necessary documents.
If candidates are eligible to apply for a particular programme, they must submit the registration fees, fill out the admission form and finally the admission slip will be generated.
STEP 2: Bhabha University Selection Criteria 2025

The next step ofBhabha University admission processis that candidates must appear for the entrance examinations for specific programmes. Candidates must appear for JEE Main,NEET UG, NEET PG,GATE, GPAT, CAT,CMATand other entrance tests according to the programme they have applied for duringBhabha University application process.
STEP 3: Bhabha University Counselling and Seat Allotment

Bhabha University then releases the merit list and the shortlisted candidates are required to appear for the counselling process and according to the rank and scores achieved in respective qualifying or entrance examination, Bhabha University allots seat to candidates. CheckBhabha University Cutoffs.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Bhabha University?

Ltd., and Mandot Securities. Average placement is around 3 Lakhs and the highest being around 8 Lakhs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 9 Dec 2023)
reviews.review_heading: This college is very good for studies.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent. Very quiet and nature-friendly surroundings with well-maintained facilities and up-to-date equipment are there. The class room is well equipped with Wi-Fi access for everyone; laboratories have well-updated technologies; and libraries have well-stocked books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Bhabha College of Dental SciencesReviewed on 28 Aug 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by faculty and placement.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library. Quality of food is excellent. All the sports are organised every year. Medical facilities are very good. Quality of food in the canteen as well as in the mess is very good. Hostels are well maintained and all the facilities are available. The campus is too big.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Bhabha College of Dental SciencesReviewed on 25 Aug 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college because faculty members are not good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are not available in our college. Classrooms are not good. The facilities in the hostel are not good. Food is not available in the hostel. Mess, canteen, and playgrounds are not available. There will be no games played on the grounds of this college. Water and other needed sources are not provided by the college management and the college does not provide any facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are available in our department like Wi-Fi is good, labs are good but could be better. Our classrooms are clean and the library is too good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is excellent. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also very good. They provide the best medical facilities as well as the best sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2015Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 31 Jan 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Average college. Placements never came in 2015. Overall my decision for admission was right.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was not so good. As it was like just a box type blocks. Wi-fi was not available at that time labs were available. Workshop were also there. Mess was for hostel. And canteen for discollar. Library was of around 3000 sq ft and had appprox 10000 books at my time for engineering.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2016Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 24 Jul 2021)
reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed with this college.
reviews.review_text: There is only a building for collecting money from students. There are no labs and internet facilities for students. There is a canteen, which serves tea and snacks only. Our college does not provide medical facilities. There is no sports ground.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2016Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 27 Jun 2021)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, we had the worst experience ever.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college were not good. without Wi-Fi, labs, etc., were not provided. The hostel was also not too good and there was no water purifier machine. The food served in the mess was not good. The same menu was served during the entire week. Overall it was the worst experience.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Bhabha College of Dental SciencesReviewed on 3 Jun 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is worth for your education .
reviews.review_text: Everything on the campus is average. The complete university complies with five colleges all together - dental college, MBA college, Pharmacy college, hotel management, and engineering college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 30 Aug 2019)
reviews.review_heading: It is a superb college to study, good faculty, and an awesome campus.
reviews.review_text: If one talks about curriculum activities, then there is a huge amount of extracurricular activities for students in Lovely Professional University. They are always involved in playing drama, dance, and other things after the classes. The campus is huge and approximately spread over 5 square kilometres. Labs were too good and also the lab infrastructure. All devices are working. They are useful in making every semester project and gain knowledge. Mini project and expo project were done by the stu...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 28 Aug 2019)
reviews.review_heading: The college has very good placements, and faculty members are qualified and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all types of facilities like Computer labs, Wi-Fi, Practical labs, a library, sport and games, neat and clean classrooms are available. Quality of food served in the canteen is very good. Hostels are available for students and faculty members.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 27 Aug 2019)
reviews.review_heading: Placement are so good in 2018. Around 50%-60% students placed in 2018.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like wi-fi, labs, classroom, library, sports, and Games, etc. , are available in our college. We have about 70 classroom and 30 labs available in our college. All the students can have good food on the campus Hostel rooms are very good. & food quality are also well in my hostel mess. I didn't face any issues regarding the infrastructure of our college Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 27 Aug 2019)
reviews.review_heading: Almost 70-80% of the students are placed every year.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. College is equipped with more than required labs and has football and basketball ground. Medical facilities and classrooms are decent and clean, and students have to maintain it well. The quality of food is served in both the canteen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 27 Aug 2019)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Bhabha Engineering Research Institute.
reviews.review_text: Amenities like a library, hostel, canteen, sports, garden, classrooms, Wi-Fi, cold water, air-conditioners, ATM, are provided here. It is a good college to be associated with the particular fields of the college, and they conducted classes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2014Offered by Bhabha Engineering Research InstituteReviewed on 8 Nov 2016)
reviews.review_heading: Worst MBA college in Bhopal
reviews.review_text: They have the worst infrastructure. They said that it is the only college in central India to have fully-equipped. paragraphs: Bhabha University's BSc fee structure consists of tuition fees, admission fees, and other payments. The admission fee and other payments should be paid only once. Besides, the tuition fee should be paid semester-wise. However, the tuition fee for Bhabha University's BSc courses ranges form INR 49,200 to INR 2.8 lakh.
NOTE: The aforementioned fee structure is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.

The students who are pursuing various programmes at the institutions affiliated to Bhabha University can avail various scholarships. Bhabha University scholarships can be availed by the meritorious students and students who belong to particular categories. Mentioned below is the Bhabha University scholarships that can be availed by students:
Scholarship
Eligibility Criteria
Mukhyamantri Medhavi Vidyarthi Yojana, Madhya Pradesh

Class 12 with 75% or more from the state board and 85% or more from CBSE/ ICSE and annual income should not exceed INR 6 lakh. JEE Main rank till 50,000 or less for engineering student. Medical or Dental student should have cleared NEET exam.
Post Matric Scholarship Scheme for OBC Students, MP
OBC category students whose family income is less than INR 75,000 for 100% scholarship and INR 1 Lakh for 50% scholarship.

UG, PG, diploma, Polytechnic or any ITI stream student whose parent is an unorganised workman under the department of Labour in MP. JEE Main rank till 1,50,000 or below for Engineering student.

After the secondary level, for SC category students
Post Matric Scholarship Scheme for ST Students, MP
Annual family income is less than INR 2.50 lakh for 100% scholarship and family income lies between INR 2.50 Lakh to 6 lakh for 50% scholarship.
Minority Scholarship MP
Meritorious students from minority communities

content.Placements: The top recruiting companies were Wipro, Airtel, etc. Placements were good in our course. There were good opportunities for placements. I would rate 3 stars out of 5 for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided an excellent educational environment. There were different types of laboratories for all branches. You will notice various laboratory classes for every faculty member. We had to study ourselves for a better future.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were average. I would rate 4 stars out of 5 for semester exams and faculty members. Semester exams were conducted very strictly. If you cheat during exams then you will be restricted from writing other exams. The course curriculum was medium.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sahayog Educational Campus Indira College of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Sahayog Educational Campus Indira College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline awarded by any of the Universities recognized by UGC or AIU with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories (VJ/DT- NT(A), NT(B), NT(C), NT(D), SBC, SEBC) and PwD belonging to Maharashtra State only) or its equivalent. 
Candidates appeared for the final year examination are also eligible to apply.
Maharashtra State candidate must have obtained more than zero score in MAH CET 2020.
All India/Jammu and Kashmir Migrant candidate should have obtained more than zero score in MAH CET/CAT/CMAT/MAT/GMAT/ATMA/XAT.B.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/C

college_info.college_name: Lovely Professional University- Seekho: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The CMAT 2026 result has been declared for Lovely Professional University- Seekho admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. Students can download their scorecards by logging into the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lovely Professional University- Seekho offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as BBA. Whereas, at PG level, Lovely Professional University- Seekho offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Lovely Professional University- Seekho fee structure for all the courses is around INR 6,00,000 to 9,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of infrastructure, good placement drive in 2023.

review_content.Placements: The placement drives happens every year inside the campus with the help of faculty support in different multinational organisations. 1. Firstly, talking about the percent of students placed inside the campus is around 98.371 percent in the year 2023. the students who are not having any backlogs and having minimum 6 CGPA were placed in good companies. 2. Talking about the package the companies bought by the university for campus drives were offering good packages according to their interview scores a. the highest package:- 38 Lacs per annum b. average salary:-11 Lacs per annum c. the lowest salary:- 8.3 Lacs per annum 3. The companies visiting campus was highly certified and approved by the government nearly 200+ companies visit every year top recruiters are :- kpmg, ibm, shhrm, spice catylyts, wns, nse, digital catalyst, adloid services etc. 4. The percent of students offered internship with stipend is nearly 81 percent the companies offered internship is kpmg, ibm, shhm, spice catylyst, wns, nse etc. 5. The roles offered by the company is : financial manager, management consultant, medical and health services manager etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied when it comes to LPU.

review_content.Placements: There are 70 students in each section, of which most students get placement opportunities. Top-notch companies that hire from IITs and IIMs also hire from our university. We received very decent packages and several offers from different companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is awesome there. The whole area is more than 800 acres. The infrastructure comprises separate blocks for each course, along with a building for the Division of Students' Welfare Wing, and a good medical facility providing a hospital called the university hospital.

college_info.intro:
Chennais Amirta International Aviation College (IAC) offers various programmes at the UG level. The college offers these programmes in collaboration with the University College of Aviation Malaysia (UniCAM). Chennais Amirta IAC flagship programmes include BSc and BA programme at the UG level.
The college offers BA in Aviation Management and BSc in Air Transport Management programmes to students. The Bachelor of Aviation Management programme focuses on topics such as business communication, operations, security, economics, etc. It strives to equip students with industry-level experience which helps them to handle various roles in the aviation sector. Further, the Bachelor of Science in Air Transport Management covers the key areas in the field of aviation. Candidates can check the Chennais Amirta Aviation College popular programmes in the table given below:

placements.overview: Chennais Amirta International Aviation College provides placement opportunities to students. The college has a separate placement cell to maintain relationships with leading companies and to generate placement and internship opportunities for students. Further, the college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance from the dedicated Chennais Amirta Aviation College placement team. Candidates can take a look below at some of the top recruiters of Chennais Amirta International Aviation College:

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Chennais Amirta International Aviation College courses are offered to students at the UG level. The college offers BA and BSc programme to students across various specialisations such as Aviation Management and Air Transport Management. These programmes are offered to students in the full-time mode for a duration of 3 years.

Further, the Chennais Amirta Aviation College courses are offered to students in collaboration with the University College of Aviation Malaysia (UniCAM). Apart from this, the college also offers a Diploma in Aviation & Tourism Management programme to students, which also has a duration of 3 years. Some of the most popular career options in the field of Aviation include Air Hostess, Airline Manager, Airport Management, Air Traffic Controller, etc. The following table showcases a list of along with their eligibility criteria and total tuition fee:

admission_process.title: Chennais Amirta International Aviation College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Chennais Amirta International Aviation College admissions 2025 areopen. The college offers admission to UG, PG and diploma courses. Chennais Amirta International Aviation College has a partial collaboration with theUniversity College of Aviation Malaysia. Candidates pursuing three-year degree courses atChennais Amirta International Aviation Collegewill complete their first and second years in India and the final year will forwarded to the University College of Aviation Malaysia. The final year of the course includes six months of classroom education at the university and six months of internship at Malaysian airports during their third year of studies.

Chennais Amirta International Aviation admissions are merit-based. Further, candidates may be required to attend a personal interview. More details about Chennais Amirta International Aviation admission 2025 are defined in the article below.

Chennais Amirta International Aviation offers BSc, BBA, BA, MBA and Diploma courses in the stream of Aviation. More details aboutChennais Amirta International Aviation courseseligibility and selection criteria are tabulated below:
Check below the detailed steps for Chennais Amirta International Aviation admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process

The application process for Chennais Amirta International Aviation is conducted in an online mode. Candidates need to fill an enquiry form mentioning details around their name, email Id, phone number and course choice. However, candidates can also apply online on the official website.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Chennais Amirta International Aviation College admissions are completely merit-based. Students are shortlisted based on their past academic records. After filling out the enquiry form on the college's official website, candidates are approached by an admission counsellor who helps students related to the admission proceedings.
Step 3: Final Admission

After getting a call from the admission counsellor and fulfilling the basic admission formalities, candidates must pay a certain amount ofChennais Amirta International Aviation feeto confirm their seats. The admission is strictly based on‘First Come First Serve’ admission policy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 10 students were placed out of 54. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA, while the highest was 9 LPA. The top recruiting company was Tech Mahindra. Around 60% of students got internships. The best role offered was project assistant at Tech Mahindra.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were well-ventilated and comfortable classrooms. There was a canteen, a small basketball court, and a garden. There were dedicated labs for major subjects, and the library had a huge collection of books. The hostel was quite good according to the fee. There were no medical facilities except first aid.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Check the placement records of the last 5 years of the college before taking admission.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, only 5 toppers were asked for direct interviews, and the rest 30+ students were required to clear the aptitude test. Only 3 of them cleared it and were given a chance for the interview. 4 of the toppers and 1 of the other students got placed in TCS, and the rest were left to seek a job on their own. So, the placement rate is not even 10%. Since TCS was the only hiring company, the package offered was 3.25 LPA for all the students. No other company came for us. No internship was offered. The students who got placed were recruited as assistant engineers.

faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology - HCET is one of the most respected institutes in India in all three states: engineering, technology, and the kind of quality education for which competency is being produced in this institute. It was established in 1994. The college still expects commitment towards providing quality education and competent graduates from this institute. It offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering, with courses accredited by national bodies. Modern infrastructural facilities, experienced faculty, and a strong focus on research and innovation are the characteristics of the college. The placement cell meets all the demands of the students and enhances its reputation by successfully connecting students with the front-end companies. HCET gets active participation in technical and cultural events, which also lets it achieve recognition in the educational sector.
faqs.question: Q: Is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) a known institute?

faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology, Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh is a good college. Some key points to consider:HCET is one of the oldest private engineering institutes in the region .The college has experienced faculty members, which is a big advantage for the students. Even though the college has a placement cell, the record could be improved further. Few students have complained that the campus life is not as happening as it should be. Student reviews on platforms like Shiksha are great to get first-hand insights into the college experience.Overall, HCET is a good option for engineering and management studies in the region; however, one has to weigh their priorities before making a decision.
faqs.question: Q: Is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) good?

faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology, HCET is known for its quality education, standards of state-of-the-art facilities, and putting strong emphasis on practical learning. The college provides a range of engineering programmes accredited by the appropriate bodies that ensure and maintain high academic standards of the courses. The teaching members are highly qualified with many having industry experience. They provide the students with valuable insight and mentorship. HCET also owes its success to a strong placement cell that has always provided jobs to the fresh graduates at the top-level companies. The college also promotes extracurricular and technical events among the students, thus creating an all-round environment to be further enhanced.
faqs.question: Q: Why is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) so famous?

faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) goes up to 300. Courses offerred by Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE.

overview_faqs.question: Is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) a known institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology - HCET is one of the most respected institutes in India in all three states: engineering, technology, and the kind of quality education for which competency is being produced in this institute. It was established in 1994. The college still expects commitment towards providing quality education and competent graduates from this institute. It offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering, with courses accredited by national bodies. Modern infrastructural facilities, experienced faculty, and a strong focus on research and innovation are the characteristics of the college. The placement cell meets all the demands of the students and enhances its reputation by successfully connecting students with the front-end companies. HCET gets active participation in technical and cultural events, which also lets it achieve recognition in the educational sector.

overview_faqs.question: Is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) good?
overview_faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology, Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh is a good college. Some key points to consider:HCET is one of the oldest private engineering institutes in the region .The college has experienced faculty members, which is a big advantage for the students. Even though the college has a placement cell, the record could be improved further. Few students have complained that the campus life is not as happening as it should be. Student reviews on platforms like Shiksha are great to get first-hand insights into the college experience.Overall, HCET is a good option for engineering and management studies in the region; however, one has to weigh their priorities before making a decision.

overview_faqs.question: Why is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology, HCET is known for its quality education, standards of state-of-the-art facilities, and putting strong emphasis on practical learning. The college provides a range of engineering programmes accredited by the appropriate bodies that ensure and maintain high academic standards of the courses. The teaching members are highly qualified with many having industry experience. They provide the students with valuable insight and mentorship. HCET also owes its success to a strong placement cell that has always provided jobs to the fresh graduates at the top-level companies. The college also promotes extracurricular and technical events among the students, thus creating an all-round environment to be further enhanced.

overview_faqs.question: Is Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) has a rating of 3.26 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.16 on Campus Life, 2.92 on Placements, 3.49 on Faculty and 3.43 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members.

content.Placements: The placement percentage of our college is 40%, but because of the recession, it goes to less than 15%. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Atos, Capgemini, Soft Solution, etc. Many students got placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well-designed. Our college has 3 floors. The library has many books related to all courses. Our college has a canteen. The food served in the canteen is good. The hostel facility is available in our college. The hostel is clean.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET).

content.Placements: In our college, almost 60% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 9.6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Tech Mahindra, TCS, and Cognizant visited our campus. Almost 80% of students got internships. Top roles offered were assistant project executive, team leader, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was classy. The library was full of technical books. Wi-Fi was a little slow at that time. Classrooms were well-ventilated and open while every major subject had a dedicated lab of itself. The hostel had good infrastructure, spacious rooms, and proper security. The mess owner was student-friendly, and the food served was hygienic. Medical facilities were not available. There was a basketball ground and there was also an amphitheater.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 10 students were placed out of 54. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA, while the highest was 9 LPA. The top recruiting company was Tech Mahindra. Around 60% of students got internships. The best role offered was project assistant at Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: There were well-ventilated and comfortable classrooms. There was a canteen, a small basketball court, and a garden. There were dedicated labs for major subjects, and the library had a huge collection of books. The hostel was quite good according to the fee. There were no medical facilities except first aid.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Check the placement records of the last 5 years of the college before taking admission.

content.Placements: In my batch, only 5 toppers were asked for direct interviews, and the rest 30+ students were required to clear the aptitude test. Only 3 of them cleared it and were given a chance for the interview. 4 of the toppers and 1 of the other students got placed in TCS, and the rest were left to seek a job on their own. So, the placement rate is not even 10%. Since TCS was the only hiring company, the package offered was 3.25 LPA for all the students. No other company came for us. No internship was offered. The students who got placed were recruited as assistant engineers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, facilities and hard-working faculty members.

content.Placements: More than 50% of the students get placed already, and the placements are still going on. I cannot make out the exact number, but the students are satisfied with their placements. The minimum salary package offered is 1.8 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 3.4 LPA. The best companies like TCS and Wipro visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The department has fully equipped computer labs. I did not use the hostel facility, so I do not have much idea about it. I would still recommend the facilities offered by the institution hostel.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET)?

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) B.E. / B.Tech course without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET) for BTech without the JEE Main exam. Eligible candidates will also have to appear for the MP BE exam and score valid marks to secure admission to the course.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well-designed. Our college has 3 floors. The library has many books related to all courses. Our college has a canteen. The food served in the canteen is good. The hostel facility is available in our college. The hostel is clean.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was classy. The library was full of technical books. Wi-Fi was a little slow at that time. Classrooms were well-ventilated and open while every major subject had a dedicated lab of itself. The hostel had good infrastructure, spacious rooms, and proper security. The mess owner was student-friendly, and the food served was hygienic. Medical facilities were not available. There was a basketball ground and there was also an amphitheater.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There were well-ventilated and comfortable classrooms. There was a canteen, a small basketball court, and a garden. There were dedicated labs for major subjects, and the library had a huge collection of books. The hostel was quite good according to the fee. There were no medical facilities except first aid.

reviews.review_heading: Check the placement records of the last 5 years of the college before taking admission.
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms were good. But there was no Wi-Fi. There were no machines in labs. The faculty members just put pressure on students. The librarian doesn't want to work. You have to stand for at least 1 hour to get a book (maximum 4 books) issued. At the time of return, they just misplace the books to add it up to your fine.
I didn't opt for the hostel or food facilities, as I live nearby. But my friends lived there. The college hostel was poor and expensive, so even the girls rented a room outsi...

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, facilities and hard-working faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The department has fully equipped computer labs. I did not use the hostel facility, so I do not have much idea about it. I would still recommend the facilities offered by the institution hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It was a good college. But as most of the teachers left it is not in good condition.
reviews.review_text: Our college had good facilities. We had elevators, parking & other basic amenities that were well-managed. There was a well-equipped computer centre. Classrooms were also good & well maintained. The entire campus was covered with CCTV, which makes it safe. Our college had a good & clean cafeteria. The campus was clear & clean. We had indoor & outdoor sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: HCET Jabalpur is the best college to have a better future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is always available, and every floor has 3 laboratories and libraries. Classrooms can accommodate 150-200 students at a time. There are air-conditioned classrooms and libraries. Hostels are available for students, and some of our friends stayed in the hostels. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, which are around at 600 yards far from each other. The food facility is good, and 24x7 water and electricity facility is available. Wi-Fi facility is provided for educational pu...

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is top-class. There isn't a college in Jabalpur which is as smartly built like ours. Labs are not much used here, but the equipment available there is quite old. Even the food served is good. The only issue with the infrastructure is the campus houses College of Architecture and Dental hospital too. Otherwise, the campus would be scenic.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET).
reviews.review_text: The college has a unique infrastructure, and one can really admire it. As various departments are allocated different buildings and each building is interconnected, students can go from 1 to other building through different floors of the building. Even our canteen is amazing, and it is situated by the side of the lake.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hitkarini College of Engineering and Technology (HCET).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was well maintained. There are fully equipped labs, computer centre, library, photocopy and printing machines, and cafeteria, etc. But there was no playground. The food served was not bad and similar to what is offered by any hostel canteen. Hostel rooms were spacious enough and worth for the money paid. It was around Rs. 50,000 per year for hostel including food.

reviews.review_heading: A college which turned into dust by the administration.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent. Our computer rooms are air-conditioned. Sports facilities were good until my 2nd year. After that, the college turned off most of the activities as every one in the board of directors and administration panel were least happy to run the college. Everything was good until 2012, but the facilities and almost all the other things went in bad shape after that.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are not good, and placements are poor.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. Classrooms are not that good, but okay. There is no medical facility. However, there is a dental college besides the college to provide medical facilities. Sports activities conducted in the college are good. Sports like badminton, cricket, and table tennis are available. Quality of food served is okay. Hostels are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: There are good facilities in our college, but due to bad management, I am dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus for students. The library and labs are good, all machines and instruments are available in labs. In sports and games, badminton court is good at our college. Medical facilities are also available in our college as dental college is near to our college. The quality of classrooms is average. The canteen is superb, and the quality of food in it is good. The hostel rooms are very good. I can say that this is the best hostel in Jabalpur at a very effectiv...

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are pretty clean and well-furnished with cameras and green boards. The labs are great. A lot of old instruments are available like Lathe. Food is available in the canteen. Good hostel rooms are available with good facilities. There is a little issue with infrastructure like watercoolers are not good, and there is no AC. During summer it is difficult to study.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure among other colleges in the town. The campus has a 5-story building, 2 elevators, classy canteen, auditorium, badminton hall, centralised library, well-equipped computer lab, volleyball court, separate vehicle parking areas for students and faculty members, and bus facilities from every corner of the town.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a great place to make your future better.

review_content.Placements: Placements were excellent in our batch. All students were placed in the 2014-16 batch. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. Companies like Kervy, Star, Pepsi, Axis Bank, Reliance, HDFC Bank, P&G, Ruchi and Cease Fire visited our college. Roles like deputy manager and assistant manager were offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The colleges provide lab facilities, Wi-Fi and medical facilities. The college conducts lots of activities for the improvement of students' leadership quality and management ability. Hostel rooms are very good with 24 hours electricity supply. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

college_info.college_name: Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT) Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

college_info.intro:
IIFT Bareilly offers various UG, PG, PG Diploma, and online certification programmes. The UG course include a BSc in Fashion & Apparel Design. The PG courses include a Master's in Fashion Management, a Post Graduate Diploma in Fashion Styling & Communication, a Post Graduate Diploma in Fashion Design & Boutique Management and an MBA in Fashion and Interior Designing.
Also, the institute provides various interior designing courses which include a Diploma in Interior Designing (6 Months), a Diploma in Interior Designing (1 Year), a PG Diploma in Interior Designing (6 Months), and a PG Diploma in Interior Designing (1 Year). Additionally, the institute provides weekend and online programmes in various specialisations. Below are the IIFT Bareilly popular programmes:

placements.overview: IIFT Bareilly offers great placement assistance to its students. IIFT Bareilly Placement 2024 statistics have not been released yet. The same will be available here once released. However, at IIFT Bareilly, a lot of top companies have participated in the placement drive. Some of the top recruiters of IIFT Bareilly are as follows:

faqs.answer: A:    The top hiring companies of IIFT Bareilly are:International fashion designersIndian fashion designersMovie production housesFashion studiosAdvertising agenciesExport housesBuying agenciesModelling agenciesDomestic production houses
faqs.question: What are the top hiring companies of IIFT Bareilly?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT) offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Design. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., B.A. and UG Diploma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT) offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and PG Diploma.

faqs.answer: A:    The admission criteria for all courses at IIFT Bareilly are based on the merit secured by the candidate in the qualifying exam as well as first-come-first-serve basis. The complete admission process for IIFT Bareilly is given below:Application: The mode of application is offline. Candidates must visit the campus and submit the duly filled form at the admission office of the Bareilly Campus.Selection rounds: The candidates are shortlisted based on their merit and on a first-come-first-serve basis. Also, IIFT Bareilly has a limited number of seats for each course; therefore, candidates must apply to their desired course within the stipulated time limit.Admission confirmation: Once the selection rounds are completed, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. It's important to note that the admission to IIFT courses is only confirmed when the candidate pays the required fee. Candidates must also note that once the fee is submitted, it will not be refunded.
faqs.question: Can I join IIFT Bareilly directly?

faqs.answer: A:    IIFT Bareilly offers a two-year MBA programme in Fashion and Interior Designing.The Indian Institute of Fashion Technology MBA total tuition fee is INR 3 Lacs for two years. The fee is sourced from official sources and is subject to change.Admission to IIFT Bareilly MBA is done on a first-come-first-serve basis and admission will be confirmed only when the aspirant pays the required admission fee.
faqs.question: What is the cost of the IIFT Bareilly MBA course?

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT) is around INR 300000.
faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT)?

faqs.answer: A:    The evaluation system for IIFT Bareilly is as follows:There shall be formal examinations.A student is free to pursue a course up to the level she desires.Awards will be given as follows:Diploma shall be awarded only on completion of the course. Certificates will be awarded for short-term courses. All the assessments done during the semester would be added together for the award of grades at the close of the semester.Grades would be awarded according to the following criteria:90% to above – Distinction71% to 89% – Grade A61% to 70% – Grade B50% to 60% – Grade CAny student securing less than the required percentage of marks in any subject will have to re-appear for awards of diploma. The results of each semester would be displayed on the notice board.
faqs.question: What are the evaluation systems for IIFT Bareilly?

review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, classrooms have a good infrastructure. Wi-Fi and lift are not available. There is no canteen and mess. Laboratory and sewing lab are available. Classrooms are good with nice infrastructure. Our campus is nice but not huge. There is a building and there is no ground.

faqs.question: Can I join IIFT Bareilly directly?
faqs.answer: The admission criteria for all courses at IIFT Bareilly are based on the merit secured by the candidate in the qualifying exam as well as first-come-first-serve basis. The complete admission process for IIFT Bareilly is given below:Application: The mode of application is offline. Candidates must visit the campus and submit the duly filled form at the admission office of the Bareilly Campus.Selection rounds: The candidates are shortlisted based on their merit and on a first-come-first-serve basis. Also, IIFT Bareilly has a limited number of seats for each course; therefore, candidates must apply to their desired course within the stipulated time limit.Admission confirmation: Once the selection rounds are completed, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. It's important to note that the admission to IIFT courses is only confirmed when the candidate pays the required fee. Candidates must also

faqs.question: What are the courses that Indian Institute Of Fashion Technology (IIFT) offers?
faqs.answer: Indian Institute of Fashion Technology offers more than five courses at undergraduate, postgraduate and Diploma levels. The Institute has always been considered the top and best choice by students searching to make a career in the field of fashion designing, and interior designing as it is considered one of the best fashion designing institutes in Bareilly.The institute offers MBA, BSc, UG Diploma and BA course in the following fashion related fields:Fashion DesigningInterior DesigningComputer DesigningFashion StylingApparel MerchandisingMakeup and AccessoriesGarment and Manufacturing

faqs.question: How can I get into Indian Institute for Fashion Technology Bareilly?
faqs.answer: IIFT Bareilly admissionis done onfirst come first serve and merit basisfor qualified students. To apply for any course, candidates need to visit the college campus and purchase the application form along with the prospectus, and submit the duly filled form at the admission office with other required documents. Aspirants are required to meet the minimum eligibility criteria before applying, find below the eligibility and selection criteria for admission toIIFT Bareilly courses:CoursesEligibilitySelection CriteriaBScClass in any stream from a recognised boardFirst-come-First-serve and Merit-basedIIFT2 DiplomaClass 12First-come-First-serve and Merit-basedBScClass 12First-come-First-serve and Merit-basedBAClass 12First-come-First-serve and Merit-based

faqs.question: What are the evaluation systems for IIFT Bareilly?
faqs.answer: The evaluation system for IIFT Bareilly is as follows:There shall be formal examinations.A student is free to pursue a course up to the level she desires.Awards will be given as follows:Diploma shall be awarded only on completion of the course. Certificates will be awarded for short-term courses. All the assessments done during the semester would be added together for the award of grades at the close of the semester.Grades would be awarded according to the following criteria:90% to above – Distinction71% to 89% – Grade A61% to 70% – Grade B50% to 60% – Grade CAny student securing less than the required percentage of marks in any subject will have to re-appear for awards of diploma. The results of each semester would be displayed on the notice board.
